titleStmt.title: SII 22.573: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 573. (A.R. No. 573 of 1906) CHITTOOR DISTRICT, PUNGANUR TALUK, MŪGAVĀḌI Puṇḍīśvara temple-On a second slab set up in its front Parak. Adhirājēndradēva-3rd year (1070 A.D.)

summary.p: This is damaged. It begins with the introduction Tiṅgaḷērmalarndu etc. It is stated that the officer Vichchādiran Madhurāntakaṉ alias Sēnāpati Vīrarājēndra-Kārāṇai-Viḻupparaiyaṉ set up the images of Sōmāskandadēva called Kārāṇai-Viṭaṅkar after his name, and of Vighnēśvara under the name Arumoḻi-nāyakar in the temple of Tirumukkīśvaram-udaiya-mahādēva at Mukkaipāḍi in Puli-nāḍu a division of Perumbāṇappāḍi in Paḍuvūr-kōṭṭam of Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-maṇḍalam and endowed 4000 kuḻi of land under the tank Vīrarājēndrappērēri. The mēlvāram of both the kār and paśānam crops from this land was to be measured out to the temple by the Ūrār of the village towards all the specified requirements of worship and offerings to these deities on ordinary and special festival days throughout the year.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tiṅkaḷer malarn=tu veṇkuṭai
lai mannuyir toṟum niṉṟaruḷ curan=tu
niṟainiḻal paruppi niṟaṉ muṟaimai
yiṟc ceṅkol ticaitoṟuñ ce
lla taṅkaḷ kulamutaṟpa paru l no
ḻukivaṟkku Oṟṟaiāḻi Ulāva kaṟṟava
r tirumalarc celviya mirunilappāvai
yum kirtti naṟkkiḷa ṉva
ṟap puṇarn=tu potumai nikki tu
rimait teviyarai marapil vinila
kaṭum ku maṉnavar mu
ṟaimuṟai tannaṭi vaṇaṅka viramuttiyāka
mu mār peṉap puṇain=tu kāppukaḷ manu
tta koppara keśarivanmarā
ṉa Uṭaiyār śrī Adhirājendradevaṟku yā
ṇṭu munṟāvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻa ma
ṇṭalattup paṭuvūrk koṭṭattu perumpā
ṇappāṭip pulināṭṭu mukkaipāṭit tirumu
[kkiśva] ramuṭaiya mahādevar koyil ko co
ḻamaṇṭalattu pāṇṭi kulācanivaḷanāṭ
ṭu Eyil nāṭṭuk kūṉikuṭi kūṉi kuṭaiyāṉ vi
ccātiraṉ maturāntakanāṉa senāpati virarā
jentrakārāṇai viḻupparaiyaṉ Eḻuntaru
ḷivitta Umā[ skanta] sahita tirumeṉik kārā
ṇai viṭaṅk(ā)ṟkum meṟppaṭiyāṉ Eḻunta
ruḷuvitta vighneśvara Arumoḻināyakark
kum nimantañ ceyvitta Ivvūr kaliṅka vi
ḷākamākat teri virarājentrap pererikiḻ ki
ḻpāṟkellai Āṟum tenpāṟkellai
Erikaraikku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai puḷikku
kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai naṭukallukku te
ṟkkum naṭuvu patineṇcāṇ kolāl kuḻi
nālāyirattu kārpacāṉa melvāra nel
lukku meṟpaṭi Ūrkaḷirom nimantañ ceyta pa
ricāvatu santi muṉṟukku Arici Aṟunāḻikku
nelluk kuṟuṇi Eḻunāḻiyum santi muṉṟuk
kuk kaṟiyamutu Āṟum neyyamutu Āḻakke I
ru ceviṭaraiyum tayirramutu nāḻi Uriyum
pākku Āṟum veṟṟilai Irupattu nālukku
m nāḷḷoṉṟukku nelleḻunāḻiyum sa
nti viḷakku Aiñcukku Eṇṇai Āḻākkukku
nelliru nāḻiyum Arumoḻi nāyakaṟkku san=ti
oṉṟukku Arici Irunāḻikku nel Aiññāḻi
yum kaṟiyamutu Iraṇṭum neyyamutu Irucevi
ṭaraiyum tayirramutu Uriyum(m) pākku Iraṇ
ṭum veṟṟilai Eṭṭukkum nellu Irunāḻi
Uḻakkum san=ti munṟukku viḷakkañcukku Eṇ
ṇai Āḻākku nellu Irunāḻiyum Aḷip
pāṉ noruvanukku nellaiññāḻiyum
meṟpaṭiyāṉukkup puṭavai mutal nel
Irukalanetūṇippatakkum tiruvamāvukku
tirukkoṭi Eṟināl tirumuṇaikku tiruviḻā
ttirumuṉaikkum tirttattil tirumuṉaikku
vikkāṭṭavum pākkum veṟṟilaikku
sodakumpattukkum tirunilai viḷakku E
ṇṇai vāḻaippaḻam mamutukku kkiḻaṭṭa U
kku llirukalane tūṇi
ḷḷiṭṭa puṭavai
yañcukku vadevaṟkku
nāl
tukkum bherikkulai ttukkum kiḻvi
ṭavum kkummāka
nellu nāṟkkalane Irutūṇippatakkāka
kāṭi Uriyum gaṇapatiyār viḻāvukkut tirumu
ḷaip puḻutikkum tiruvamutukkum tiruviḷak
keṇṇaikkum Ativa kkiḻaṭṭavum
puṭavai Aiñcukku nellu nāṟkkala
ne Irutūṇi nāḻiyum ho
mattukku nā Irunāḻi U
rikku nellu mukkuṟuṇi yum ho
ma dravyattukku nelluk kuṟuṇiyum saruva
m panniraṇṭukkuk nelluk kuṟuṇi Aṟu nā
ḻiyum yāka tevarkkut tiruvamutu Uḷḷiṭṭu
veṇṭuvaṉattukku nelluk kuṟuṇi
Aiññāḻi Uriyum tiruviḷakkukku viḷakku O
ṉṟukku Eṇṇai Uḻakkāka viḷakku Aimpa
tukku Eṇṇai kuṟuṇi nāṉāḻi Uriyum tiru
volakkattukku Aṇukkaṉ viḷakkeṇṇai
Aiññāḻikkumāka nellu Irukalane patakki
ru nāḻiyum Uṭaiyārkkuṅ kārāṇaiviṭaṅ
karkkum tiruvamutarici mukkuṟuṇikku nellu
Eḻukuṟuṇi nāṉāḻiyum kaṟiyamutukkum ney
yamutukkum tayiramutukkum Aṭaikkāyamutuk
kumāka nellu patakku muṉnāḻiyumāka nā
ḷ ḷonṟukku nel mukkalane Irutūṇi
patakkirunāḻiyumāka nāḷ Ēḻukku nellu
Irupatteḻukalane Orunāḻi Uriyum tirt
tattukku tiruccuṇṇam poṭikkum mañcaḷuk
kum Eṇṇaikkum kāl cuṟṟap puṭavaikkum
Aṭik kūṟṟukkum nellum tirukkāppu nā
ṇ munṟukkum panniraṇṭu mañcāṭikku ne
l kalamum Āka nel Irukalane mukkuṟuṇiyu
m tiruviḻāc cevikkumaṭiyārkkum paricārakaṟ
kkum nāḷonṟukku Arici Irutūṇi Āka nā
ḷ Ēḻukku Arici nāṟkkalane Irutūṇikku
nel patinorukalane Irutūṇiyum dekṣaṇai
kku pon Araik kaḻaiñcukkum tirtta vā
rikku paḻakkattukku puṭavai Irupatukkumā
ka nel Irupatin kalamum tirukkoṭi Iḻi
cca nel Irutūṇiyum Ippaṭi celutta
kkaṭavār meṟpaṭiyūr civabrāhmaṇan kāśya
pa gottirattu periyamātavan comanu
m kommat mātavanum Ivviruvarum Iva
rkaḷ Annuvayattāru muṭṭil muṭṭiraṭṭi
ceyyak kaṭavārkaḷākavum Ippaṭi ceyvi
ttu kūṉikuṭaiyān viccātiran maturānta
ka nāṉa senāpati virarājentrakkāraṇai vi
ḻuppa
rai
ya ne
ṉ I
tta
nmaa
ṣippā
rge
ṅkai
yiṭai
kku
mariyi
ṭaic
cey
tār
cey
ta pāva
ttil
povā
r go
brāhma
ṇarai
k ko
ṟṟa bra
hmahat
tiyil
povā
ṉ val
lava
raiya
n cat
tiyam .
Digital edition of SII 22.573 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
